Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1F00 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Death Wake.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0d00 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Death Wake.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0C00 which: 1. Displays the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game 2. Once the loading screen has been displayed, it then turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts
The memory between $0B12-$0F82 contained an unecessary repeating memory block. Therefore this range was zeroed out.
